mnemonics.title: DQP Phases
mnemonics.content: Dogs Quickly Dig (Decomposition, Localization, Global Optimization)

acronyms.usage: Optimizer's chosen strategy for query processing

visualTips.visualization: Imagine upside-down tree with root=final result, leaves=data sources
Picture spider web connecting multiple database nodes

analogies.analogy: Like coordinating a supply chain - gather parts from multiple warehouses efficiently
Similar to group voting - all nodes must agree before committing
